name: kiprio
description: Kiprio developer APIs as Claude Code plugin — Open Graph extraction, UK business-day calculator, email validation, screenshot capture, DNS / SSL inspection, and more. Free tier, no key required.

commands.name: og
commands.description: Extract Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags from any URL.

commands.name: bizday
commands.description: UK business-day calculator (England & Wales bank holidays).

commands.name: email-validate
commands.description: Email syntax, MX, disposable-domain, and role-address validation.

commands.name: screenshot
commands.description: Full-page website screenshot (PNG / JPEG, configurable viewport).

commands.name: dns
commands.description: DNS lookup (A, AAAA, MX, TXT, CNAME) for any hostname.

commands.name: ssl
commands.description: SSL certificate inspection: expiry, chain, issuer, ciphers.

commands.name: redact
commands.description: PII redaction: emails, phone numbers, NI numbers, card numbers.

commands.name: schema
commands.description: Generate JSON-LD schema markup for common types.

commands.name: qr
commands.description: QR code generation (SVG / PNG, configurable size and error correction).

commands.name: unfurl
commands.description: Link preview unfurl — title, description, favicon, primary image.
